settings.liquid:
<style>
.price-list .product-item__price-list-container,
.price-list-container .price span,
.price-list .product-item__price-list-container{
  display:block!important;
}
.product-item .product-item__price-list.active .product-card__reduced-data .price{
  font-size:10px!important;
}
span.js-price-text.vat-text{
  font-size:10px;
  color:#2c2c2c;
}
.price--highlight .price-js{
	font-size:25px!important;
}
.price-list-container-wrapper{
  padding:2rem 0 1rem!important;
}
.price-list-container .price span{
  display:block!important;
  position:relative!important;
}
.product-item .product-item__price-list.active .product-card__reduced-data .price, span.price.price--compare {
  font-size: 10px!important;
  display: flex;
  margin-bottom: 2px;
  gap:4px;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;
  flex-direction: row;
}
.product-item__colour-swatches{
position: static;
    flex-direction: row;
    justify-content: center;
    margin: 11px 0;
}
@media (min-width:640px){
.price--highlight .price-js {
    font-size: calc(var(--base-text-font-size) - (var(--default-text-font-size) - 20px))!important;
  }
}
</style>
